examples.task: criar API Go com SQLite e CRUD de TODO list

arguments.content:
module teste

go 1.18

require (
	github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.0
)

package main

import (
	"database/sql"
	_ "github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

var db *sql.DB

type Todo struct {
	ID int `json:"id"`
	Title string `json:"title"`
	Done bool `json:"done"`
}

func init() {
	db, _ = sql.Open("sqlite3", "./todos.db")
	db.Exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS todos (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, title TEXT, done BOOLEAN)")
}

func todosHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	switch r.Method {
	case "GET":
		rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id, title, done FROM todos")
		defer rows.Close()
		var todos []Todo
		for rows.Next() {
			var t Todo
			rows.Scan(&t.ID, &t.Title, &t.Done)
			todos = append(todos, t)
		}
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(todos)
	case "POST":
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO todos (title, done) VALUES (?, ?)", t.Title, t.Done)
		w.Write([]byte("created"))
	case "PUT":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("UPDATE todos SET title=?, done=? WHERE id=?", t.Title, t.Done, id)
		w.Write([]byte("updated"))
	case "DELETE":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		db.Exec("DELETE FROM todos WHERE id=?", id)
		w.Write([]byte("deleted"))
	}
}

func main() {
	http.HandleFunc("/todos", todosHandler)
	http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil)
}

module teste

go 1.18

require (
	github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql v1.6.0
)

package main

import (

type Todo struct {
	ID int `json:"id"`
	Title string `json:"title"`
	Done bool `json:"done"`
}

func init() {
	db, _ = sql.Open("mysql", "user:password@tcp(127.0.0.1:3306)/todos_db")
	db.Exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS todos (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255), done BOOLEAN)")
}

func todosHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	switch r.Method {
	case "GET":
		rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id, title, done FROM todos")
		defer rows.Close()
		var todos []Todo
		for rows.Next() {
			var t Todo
			rows.Scan(&t.ID, &t.Title, &t.Done)
			todos = append(todos, t)
		}
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(todos)
	case "POST":
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO todos (title, done) VALUES (?, ?)", t.Title, t.Done)
		w.Write([]byte("created"))
	case "PUT":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("UPDATE todos SET title=?, done=? WHERE id=?", t.Title, t.Done, id)
		w.Write([]byte("updated"))
	case "DELETE":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		db.Exec("DELETE FROM todos WHERE id=?", id)
		w.Write([]byte("deleted"))
	}
}

func main() {
	http.HandleFunc("/todos", todosHandler)
	http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil)
}

examples.task: criar API Go com PostgreSQL e CRUD de TODO list

arguments.command: cd go && go mod init teste

arguments.content:
module teste

go 1.18

require (
	github.com/lib/pq v1.10.0
)

package main

import (
	"database/sql"
	_ "github.com/lib/pq"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

var db *sql.DB

type Todo struct {
	ID int `json:"id"`
	Title string `json:"title"`
	Done bool `json:"done"`
}

func init() {
	db, _ = sql.Open("postgres", "user=postgres password=secret dbname=todos_db sslmode=disable")
	db.Exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS todos (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255), done BOOLEAN)")
}

func todosHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	switch r.Method {
	case "GET":
		rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id, title, done FROM todos")
		defer rows.Close()
		var todos []Todo
		for rows.Next() {
			var t Todo
			rows.Scan(&t.ID, &t.Title, &t.Done)
			todos = append(todos, t)
		}
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(todos)
	case "POST":
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO todos (title, done) VALUES ($1, $2)", t.Title, t.Done)
		w.Write([]byte("created"))
	case "PUT":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		db.Exec("UPDATE todos SET title=$1, done=$2 WHERE id=$3", t.Title, t.Done, id)
		w.Write([]byte("updated"))
	case "DELETE":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		db.Exec("DELETE FROM todos WHERE id=$1", id)
		w.Write([]byte("deleted"))
	}
}

func main() {
	http.HandleFunc("/todos", todosHandler)
	http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil)
}

examples.task: criar API Go com MongoDB e CRUD de TODO list

arguments.command: cd go && go mod init teste

arguments.content:
module teste

go 1.18

require (
	go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver v1.11.0
)

package main

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"time"
	"go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/mongo"
	"go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/mongo/options"
)

type Todo struct {
	ID primitive.ObjectID `json:"_id,omitempty" bson:"_id,omitempty"`
	Title string `json:"title" bson:"title"`
	Done bool `json:"done" bson:"done"`
}

var collection *mongo.Collection

func init() {
	client, _ := mongo.Connect(context.Background(), options.Client().ApplyURI("mongodb://localhost:27017"))
	collection = client.Database("todos_db").Collection("todos")
}

func todosHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	switch r.Method {
	case "GET":
		cursor, _ := collection.Find(context.Background(), map[string]interface{}{})
		defer cursor.Close(context.Background())
		var todos []Todo
		cursor.All(context.Background(), &todos)
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(todos)
	case "POST":
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		collection.InsertOne(context.Background(), t)
		w.Write([]byte("created"))
	case "PUT":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var t Todo
		json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&t)
		collection.UpdateOne(context.Background(), map[string]interface{}"id": id}, map[string]interface{}"$set": t})
		w.Write([]byte("updated"))
	case "DELETE":
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		collection.DeleteOne(context.Background(), map[string]interface{}"id": id})
		w.Write([]byte("deleted"))
	}
}

func main() {
	http.HandleFunc("/todos", todosHandler)
	http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil)
}
